title: Smart Enterprise Energy Orchestrator
description: Demand response on a Terna signal: the company cuts its grid draw by modulating flexible loads (EV, HVAC) and earns the 80/20 revenue split. Trigger an event from the control panel at http://localhost:8000 and watch the grid draw fall while the revenue rises.

panels.title: Current grid draw
panels.description: Power the company is drawing from the national grid right now (sum of all sites). About 316 kW at rest; it drops during a Terna event.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "energy")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry" and r._field == "grid_kw")
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> sum()

panels.title: Flexibility delivered to Terna
panels.description: Grid draw reduction actually delivered during the active event (baseline draw minus current draw). Shows 0 when no event is active.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "energy")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "economics" and r._field == "delivered_kw")
  |> group()
  |> last()

panels.title: Company revenue (80%)
panels.description: Share of revenue that goes to the company for the delivered flexibility. Grows in real time during the event.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "energy")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "economics" and r._field == "company_eur")
  |> group()
  |> last()

panels.title: Platform revenue (20%)
panels.description: Share of revenue kept by the platform (orchestration / SaaS fee).

targets.query:
from(bucket: "energy")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "economics" and r._field == "platform_eur")
  |> group()
  |> last()

panels.title: Grid draw over time
panels.description: The key curve of the demo: it collapses when Terna asks for flexibility and the system modulates the loads, then recovers when the event is released.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "energy")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry" and r._field == "grid_kw")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Grid draw"}))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

panels.title: Power by asset (what gets modulated)
panels.description: During the event: EV chargers and HVAC (flexible) go down; critical loads stay flat; solar PV stays at maximum self consumption.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "energy")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry" and (r._field == "pv_kw" or r._field == "ev_kw" or r._field == "hvac_kw" or r._field == "critical_kw"))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field:
      if r._field == "pv_kw" then "Solar PV (generation)"
      else if r._field == "ev_kw" then "EV chargers (flexible)"
      else if r._field == "hvac_kw" then "HVAC (flexible)"
      else "Critical loads (untouchable)"}))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])
